overall.description: A first-person perspective sequence from Cyberpunk 2077, beginning in the shadow of a concrete overpass and moving along a desert highway toward a massive stadium structure. The player encounters passing vehicles including a military truck, observes a soldier taking cover, and continues into an abandoned desert industrial area.

events.description: exits the shadow of the overpass into bright direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: moving steadily through the dark underpass toward the bright exit ahead

entered.detail: massive concrete bridge structure overhead casting deep shadows
thick rectangular concrete pillars supporting the overpass
metal fencing running along the left side of the underpass
tall street lamp visible through the overpass opening
rocky desert hills visible in the distance beyond the overpass

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in the deep shadow of a concrete highway overpass, with massive support pillars framing the view. The camera moves forward along the asphalt road, gradually approaching the bright exit where sunlight and distant desert rock formations become visible.

events.description: black van drives past from left to right across the field of view
large military transport truck passes by from right to left

agents.ego_description: proceeding along the highway toward the stadium, observing the passing traffic

notable_agents.action: black van driving past from left to right on the highway
military transport truck with camouflage pattern driving past

entered.detail: massive circular stadium structure with tiered seating visible on rocky hillside
tall metal lattice tower with power lines running alongside the road
arid rocky hills and desert landscape surrounding the highway
green highway sign with white text reading 'Militech'
multiple high-voltage power lines stretching across the sky

segments.scene_description: Having exited the overpass, the scene opens into a bright desert highway with a massive circular stadium dominating the right side. The camera moves along the road, passing a green Militech sign and observing vehicles including a black van and a military transport truck. Power lines and transmission towers line the route against the arid rocky backdrop.

events.description: soldier in military gear takes cover behind black SUV and aims weapon
moves off the main highway into the desert wasteland with abandoned structures

agents.ego_description: moving past the soldier and continuing into the desert area, observing the abandoned buildings

notable_agents.action: soldier in tactical gear crouching behind black SUV, aiming a rifle

entered.detail: dense desert bushes and dry shrubs lining the roadside
derelict low-rise industrial structures with rusted metal walls
corrugated metal buildings with external staircases and ventilation units
elevated highway structure visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: The final segment begins with a soldier taking cover behind a black SUV on the roadside, creating a moment of tension. The camera then moves past into a desert wasteland, leaving the stadium behind. The environment transitions to cracked earth and dirt trails surrounded by desert scrub vegetation and abandoned rusted industrial buildings, with a distant overpass visible on the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the oppressive shadow of a concrete overpass into a vast, sun-drenched desert wasteland. It begins beneath massive support pillars in deep shade, moving forward along an asphalt road toward a bright exit where distant rock formations first appear. As the camera emerges into the sunlight, the scene opens onto a bright highway dominated by a massive circular stadium and lined with power lines, passing a green Militech sign and several military vehicles. The movement continues past a soldier taking cover behind a black SUV, creating a brief moment of tension before the road gives way to a desolate expanse. Finally, the environment shifts into a wasteland of cracked earth and scrub vegetation, moving past rusted industrial buildings toward a distant overpass on the horizon.
